universe_identity.company_scope: Companies disclosed by XLG as holdings that identify the S&P 500 Top 50 membership then publicly available; XLG weights are never portfolio weights.
universe_identity.index_definition: At annual reconstitution, select 50 of the largest S&P 500 companies by float-adjusted market capitalization subject to the published selection buffer.
universe_identity.annual_reconstitution: After the close of the third Friday in June using the last business day of May as reference date.
universe_identity.inter_reconstitution_deletion: A company dropped from the S&P 500 is concurrently removed and is not replaced until the next annual reconstitution.

pit_disclosure_rule.sec_primary_available_at: Exact EDGAR accepted timestamp for the accession.
pit_disclosure_rule.invesco_fallback_available_at: An explicit official publication timestamp bound to the exact holdings bytes; an as-of date, report date, HTTP retrieval time, or page crawl date is insufficient.
pit_disclosure_rule.effective_at: The open of the first complete XNYS session strictly after accepted_at or qualified official publication timestamp.
pit_disclosure_rule.revision_rule: Preserve every accession. For the same series, contract and report date, select the latest public amendment whose exact accepted_at precedes the formation cutoff; unresolved conflicting revisions fail closed.
pit_disclosure_rule.minimum_history: No formation may precede the first complete XNYS session after the first qualified public N-PORT disclosure. The route may not claim coverage before September 2019.

selectors_frozen_before_source_access.selection: Minimum report period on or after 2019-09-01 with a public NPORT-P or NPORT-P/A accession for the exact series and contract, complete holdings, and exact accepted_at.
Maximum report period not later than 2022-06-30 for the exact series and contract.
Maximum report period not later than 2025-01-31 for the exact series and contract.
Maximum report period whose exact accession and complete holdings were publicly available before smoke retrieved_at.

holding_classification.company_identity: Normalized six-character CUSIP issuer number plus normalized issuer name. Missing CUSIP, issuer-number collision, or name conflict fails the snapshot.
holding_classification.included_security: Exchange-traded common equity security line only, with disclosed CUSIP and name and no unresolved instrument-type conflict.
holding_classification.expected_company_count: Normally 50; fewer is allowed only with primary evidence that an S&P 500 deletion occurred after annual reconstitution and the no-replacement rule applies.
holding_classification.security_line_count: May be 51 when a company has multiple common-share-class lines. More than 51 or an unexplained company/line count fails closed.

multi_class_collapse.rule: For each disclosed company with multiple eligible common-share lines, keep the line with the higher median daily dollar volume over the 60 complete trading sessions strictly before formation effective_at.
multi_class_collapse.dollar_volume: Unadjusted close multiplied by reported volume for each complete session.
multi_class_collapse.tie_break: No discretionary tie-break. Equal median values, fewer than 60 complete sessions, missing price/volume, corporate-action identity conflict, or unresolved company mapping makes that formation INPUT_BLOCKED.

sec.meaning: One script invocation with a fixed bounded request graph; each URL is fetched at most once and the graph stops immediately on HTTP 403 or transport failure.
sec.conditional_requests_if_initial_200: At most four selected same-origin filing index pages and their four primary NPORT XML documents, derived only from the frozen selectors; maximum total SEC documents is nine.

invesco_fallback.condition: SEC initial route returns HTTP 403 or transport failure.
invesco_fallback.pass_requirement: The official route must expose all four frozen historical snapshots plus an explicit publication timestamp bound to each exact holdings document. Current-only holdings or as-of dates alone fail.

route_gates.source_identity: Exact official URLs, retrieved_at, raw bytes, SHA256, HTTP status, content type, terms/license reference and route identity are recorded.
route_gates.four_snapshots: Exactly four selectors resolve without using future data.
route_gates.filing_identity: Every SEC snapshot matches CIK 0001209466, series S000060793 and contract C000197609.
route_gates.availability: Every snapshot has exact accepted_at or equivalent official publication timestamp and a mechanically determined later complete XNYS effective session.
route_gates.holdings_integrity: CUSIP, name and common-security type are present; duplicate/revision conflicts are isolated; cash and derivatives are excluded.
route_gates.company_count: Fifty companies are present unless a primary no-replacement deletion explains a lower count; at most 51 eligible security lines before the frozen multi-class collapse.
route_gates.multi_class: Every multi-class company collapses to one line using only the frozen trailing-60-session dollar-volume rule.
route_gates.no_outcomes: No return, signal, factor, strategy rank, portfolio weight, benchmark result, validation or holdout is accessed.
route_gates.unchanged_database: The canonical DuckDB identity, size, timestamps, SHA256 and WAL absence remain identical.

decision_rule.DATA_ROUTE_FEASIBLE: All route gates pass for all four snapshots and a precise contiguous usable disclosure interval can be stated.
decision_rule.INPUT_BLOCKED: SEC is 403 and Invesco lacks equivalent timestamped historical snapshots, or any required identity, availability, count, revision, instrument or multi-class gate fails.

forbidden_actions: use of XLG holding weights as portfolio weights
